body.u: I left school when I was sixteen and then I worked at Chatham Dockyard as an apprentice Electrical fitter and I turned out to be a good job and I ended up getting a lot out of it, when I was eighteen I got a brand new ford escort popular, this was a nice car, I end up changing my car 3 times, I got married to Chris carter, she was twenty three when I got married and she was a really nice woman. We bought a house in crawleyCrowley and lived happy there for many years, we had children when I was 27 and we had twins. Every Christmas, and bank holidays we visited mum and dad, I suppose mum and dad missed me. We went on holiday about 4 times. During my married life, I made a lot of new friends at the dockyard and eventually got to be foreman there getting over a hundred pounds a week, now I am in retirement, now my two sons are forty, one is a worker at sheerness steel and the other is in iranIran working for British aerospace. My life has had its good and bad times but altogether a good life, my mum lived to 88 and dad to 79 they both had good times. My sister is 58, married with 3 daughters.
